statements.sql:
select
YEAR(created_at) as year,
MONTH(created_at) as month_number,
DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%b %Y') as month,
COUNT(*) as count
from `contact_messages` where `created_at` >= '2025-07-18 13:39:04' and `contact_messages`.`deleted_at` is null group by YEAR(created_at), MONTH(created_at), DATE_FORMAT(created_at, "%b %Y") order by YEAR(created_at), MONTH(created_at)

explain.query:
select 
                    YEAR(created_at) as year,
                    MONTH(created_at) as month_number,
                    DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%b %Y') as month,
                    COUNT(*) as count
                 from `contact_messages` where `created_at` >= ? and `contact_messages`.`deleted_at` is null group by YEAR(created_at), MONTH(created_at), DATE_FORMAT(created_at, "%b %Y") order by YEAR(created_at), MONTH(created_at)
